name: fedid
info: Federated Identity handling with an SQLlite backend

verbs.name: user-create
verbs.info: federate a new user from a new social ID

verbs.name: user-federate
verbs.info: federate two social ID into one signed federated user

verbs.name: user-check
verbs.info: check is a given attribute email,pseudo exist in DB

verbs.name: user-exist
verbs.info: check is any of pseudo/email is already federated

verbs.name: social-check
verbs.info: check if a social user is already registered

verbs.name: social-idps
verbs.info: retrieve existing federated IDPs for a given user
